  includes_drc_rules boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK version includes DRC rule decks for physical verification of IC layouts.']
  includes_io_libraries boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK version includes IO pad libraries for chip-to-package interface design.']
  includes_lvs_rules boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK version includes LVS rule decks for verifying layout-to-schematic correspondence.']
  includes_memory_compilers boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK version includes memory compiler tools for generating SRAM, ROM, or other memory blocks.']
  includes_spice_models boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK version includes SPICE device models for circuit simulation and analysis.']
  includes_standard_cell_libraries boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK version includes pre-characterized standard cell libraries for digital design.']
  is_customer_accessible boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK version is available for external customer access or restricted to internal use only.']
  known_issues_count varchar [note: 'Number of documented known issues, limitations, or bugs in this PDK version that design teams should be aware of.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this PDK development record was last updated, tracking the most recent change to any field.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current state of the PDK in its development and operational lifecycle. Tracks progression from initial development through validation, release, active use, and eventual retirement.']
  mentor_compatible boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK is compatible with Mentor Graphics (Siemens EDA) tool suite.']
  metal_layers_count varchar [note: 'Number of metal interconnect layers available in this PDK for routing, typically ranging from 5 to 15+ layers for advanced nodes.']
  minimum_feature_size_nm decimal(8,3) [note: 'Smallest manufacturable feature dimension in nanometers, representing the technology nodes resolution capability.']
  pdk_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the PDK. Externally-known unique code used across design teams and EDA tool integrations.']
  pdk_custodian_email varchar [note: 'Email contact for the PDK custodian for technical support and escalation.']
  pdk_custodian_name varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or team responsible for maintaining and supporting this PDK version.']
  pdk_for_node varchar [note: 'FK to research.technology_node.technology_node_id — PDKs are developed for specific technology nodes. This is the fundamental organizing principle for PDK work.']
  pdk_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name of the PDK, typically including technology node and variant information.']
  pdk_targets_node varchar [note: 'FK to research.technology_node.technology_node_id — Every PDK is developed for a specific technology node. This is the fundamental classification link that determines which design rules, SPICE models, and libraries are included.']
  pdk_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the PDK following semantic versioning convention (e.g., 1.0, 2.1.3). Tracks iterative improvements and updates.']
  planned_release_date date [note: 'Target date for releasing this PDK version, used for roadmap planning and customer commitments.']
  predecessor_pdk_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the previous PDK release that this version supersedes or builds upon.']
  process_type varchar [note: 'Semiconductor process technology type. CMOS for complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor, BiCMOS for bipolar CMOS, SOI for silicon-on-insulator, FDSOI for fully-depleted SOI, GaN for gallium nitride, SiGe for silicon-germanium.']
  release_date date [note: 'Date when this PDK version was officially released to design teams or customers.']
  release_notes varchar [note: 'Summary of changes, enhancements, bug fixes, and known issues for this PDK version release.']
  release_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the PDK release maturity level. Alpha for early internal testing, beta for limited customer access, production for general availability, maintenance for updates, deprecated for end-of-life.']
  supports_euv_lithography boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK supports EUV lithography for critical layers, typically required for advanced nodes below 7nm.']
  synopsys_compatible boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this PDK is compatible with Synopsys EDA tool suite including Design Compiler and PrimeTime.']
  target_application varchar [note: 'Primary application domain or market segment this PDK is optimized for, such as high-performance computing, mobile, automotive, IoT, or AI accelerators.']
  validation_completion_date date [note: 'Date when all validation activities for this PDK version were completed and signed off.']
  validation_completion_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of validation test cases completed successfully, ranging from 0.00 to 100.00.']
  validation_start_date date [note: 'Date when formal validation and verification activities for this PDK version began.']
  validation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of PDK validation activities including DRC/LVS rule verification, SPICE model correlation, and design flow testing.']

  Note: 'Process Design Kit (PDK) development records tracking the creation, versioning, and release of PDKs for new technology nodes. Captures PDK ID, associated technology node, PDK version, release type (alpha, beta, production), included components (DRC rules, LVS rules, SPICE models, standard cell libraries, design rule manual), EDA tool compatibility (Cadence Virtuoso, Synopsys), validation status, known issues log, release date, and PDK custodian. Critical interface between process R&D and IC design teams.'
}

Table research.research_milestone {
  research_milestone_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the research milestone record. Primary key for milestone tracking in R&D programs and projects.']
  primary_research_approving_authority_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the approving authority for audit trail and accountability purposes.']
  research_project_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent research project or program to which this milestone belongs.']
  action_items varchar [note: 'List of follow-up actions, corrective measures, or conditions that must be addressed following the gate review. Particularly important for conditional pass outcomes.']
  actual_completion_date date [note: 'Actual date when the milestone was completed. Null if milestone is not yet completed. Used for schedule variance analysis and roadmap tracking.']
  approving_authority_name varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or committee responsible for approving the milestone completion and gate review outcome.']
  baseline_date date [note: 'Baseline date established at project approval or last formal re-baseline. Used to measure schedule performance against the approved plan.']
  budget_impact_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Financial impact or variance associated with this milestone, such as cost overruns, savings, or additional Non-Recurring Engineering (NRE) investment required.']
  budget_impact_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the budget impact amount.']
  chips_act_report_date date [note: 'Date when the milestone completion was reported to CHIPS Act oversight authorities, if applicable.']
  chips_act_reportable boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this milestone must be reported to government authorities under CHIPS and Science Act compliance requirements for federally funded semiconductor research programs.']
  collaboration_partner_involved boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether external collaboration partners (universities, research institutions, or industry partners) were involved in achieving this milestone.']
  completion_criteria varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the technical, business, or quality criteria that must be met for the milestone to be considered complete. Defines success conditions for gate reviews.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this milestone record was first created in the system.']
  critical_path_indicator boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this milestone is on the critical path of the project schedule. True if any delay to this milestone will delay the overall project completion.']
  deliverable_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the tangible deliverable or output associated with this milestone, such as design documentation, test results, prototype hardware, or qualification reports.']
  export_control_classification varchar [note: 'Export Control Classification Number (ECCN) or ITAR category assigned to the milestone deliverables, if applicable.']
  export_control_review_required boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the milestone deliverables require export control review under International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR) or Export Administration Regulations (EAR) before dissemination.']
  gate_review_date date [note: 'Date when the formal gate review was conducted and outcome was determined.']
  gate_review_outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the milestone gate review. Pass indicates all criteria met and project proceeds, conditional pass requires specific actions before proceeding, fail stops the project or phase, deferred postpones the decision, not reviewed indicates the review has not yet occurred.']
  ip_filing_triggered boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this milestone triggered or enabled intellectual property filing activities, such as patent applications or trade secret documentation.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this milestone record was last updated, reflecting the most recent change to any field.']
  milestone_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the milestone, typically following organizational naming conventions for gate reviews and technical milestones.']
  milestone_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name of the milestone describing the key deliverable or gate review event.']
  milestone_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the milestone indicating whether it is planned, actively being worked on, completed, deferred to a later date, or cancelled.']
  milestone_to_program varchar [note: 'FK to research.rd_program.rd_program_id — Milestones track progress of R&D programs. Without this link, milestone tracking is disconnected from program governance.']
  milestone_to_project varchar [note: 'FK to research.research_project.research_project_id — Milestones can also track individual project progress. Projects have their own gate reviews independent of program-level milestones.']
  milestone_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the milestone indicating the nature of the review or deliverable. Technical gates assess technology readiness, management reviews evaluate business viability, customer demos validate market fit, tapeout marks design completion, silicon return confirms fabrication success, and qualification verifies production readiness.']
  planned_date date [note: 'Originally scheduled date for milestone completion as defined in the project plan or technology roadmap.']
  plm_system_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier linking this milestone to the corresponding record in the Product Lifecycle Management system (Siemens Teamcenter PLM or Oracle Agile PLM) for traceability and document management.']
  review_meeting_minutes_url varchar [note: 'URL or document management system path to the formal meeting minutes or review documentation for the gate review.']
  risk_assessment varchar [note: 'Summary of technical, schedule, and business risks identified at the milestone review, including mitigation strategies and residual risk levels.']
  schedule_variance_days varchar [note: 'Number of days the milestone completion deviated from the planned date. Positive values indicate delay, negative values indicate early completion.']
  stakeholder_notification_sent boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether stakeholder notifications have been sent regarding the milestone completion or gate review outcome.']
  technology_readiness_level varchar [note: 'NASA Technology Readiness Level assessment at the time of milestone completion, ranging from 1 (basic principles observed) to 9 (actual system proven in operational environment). Critical for CHIPS Act reporting and technology maturity tracking.']

  Note: 'Milestone tracking records for R&D programs and projects capturing key technical and business gate reviews. Captures milestone ID, associated program or project, milestone name, milestone type (technical gate, management review, customer demo, tapeout, silicon return, qualification), planned date, actual completion date, completion criteria, gate review outcome (pass, conditional pass, fail, deferred), action items, and approving authority. Supports technology roadmap execution tracking and CHIPS Act program reporting.'
}

Table research.publication {
  publication_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for publication']
  primary_author_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the lead or corresponding author responsible for the publication.']
  publication_employee_id varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified the publication record.']
  publication_project_id varchar [note: 'FK to research.project.project_id — Publications document results from specific research projects. This link supports IP strategy decisions and technology disclosure management.']
  publication_research_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the research project associated with this publication. Links publication to the originating R&D project.']
  technology_disclosure_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal technology disclosure or invention disclosure associated with this publication.']
  abstract varchar [note: 'Summary or abstract of the publication content describing the research objectives, methods, and findings.']
  acceptance_date date [note: 'Date when the publication was accepted by the venue for publication or presentation.']
  authors varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of authors who contributed to the publication, in citation order.']
  citation_count varchar [note: 'Number of times this publication has been cited by other research works, tracked for impact measurement.']
  co_author_count varchar [note: 'Total number of co-authors listed on the publication.']
  collaboration_partner_name varchar [note: 'Name of external research institution, university, or industry partner involved in the collaborative research.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification level assigned to the publication content.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the publication record was first created in the system.']
  device_architecture_focus varchar [note: 'Novel device architecture or structure discussed in the publication (e.g., FinFET, GAA, CFET, nanowire, nanosheet).']
  doi varchar [note: 'Digital Object Identifier assigned to the publication for permanent citation and retrieval.']
  export_control_classification varchar [note: 'Export control classification code (ECCN or USML category) assigned to the publication content.']
  export_control_review_status varchar [note: 'Status of export control review to ensure compliance with ITAR, EAR, and other export regulations before publication.']
  funding_source varchar [note: 'Source of funding or sponsorship for the research work (e.g., internal R&D budget, government grant, CHIPS Act, industry consortium).']
  internal_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or file path to the internal document repository where the publication manuscript is stored.']
  isbn varchar [note: 'ISBN assigned to the publication if applicable (for books or book chapters).']
  issn varchar [note: 'ISSN assigned to the journal or serial publication if applicable.']
  itar_controlled_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the publication content is subject to ITAR export control restrictions.']
  keywords varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of technical keywords or index terms associated with the publication for search and categorization.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the publication record was last updated or modified.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments regarding the publication, review feedback, or special considerations.']
  open_access_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the publication is available as open access to the public.']
  peer_review_status varchar [note: 'Status of external peer review process for the publication.']
  plm_system_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier linking the publication to the PLM system for traceability to product development lifecycle.']
  publication_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or tracking code assigned to the publication for internal reference and cataloging.']
  publication_date date [note: 'Date when the publication was officially published or presented at the venue.']
  publication_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the publication in the submission and review process. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|submitted|under_review|accepted|published|rejected|withdrawn — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  publication_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the publication format and venue type. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: conference_paper|journal_article|invited_talk|white_paper|poster|patent_disclosure|technical_report — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  strategic_priority varchar [note: 'Strategic importance level assigned to the publication for IP strategy and talent branding.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date when the publication was submitted to the venue for review.']
  technology_disclosure_clearance_status varchar [note: 'Status of internal IP clearance review to ensure publication does not disclose proprietary or patentable information prematurely.']
  technology_domain varchar [note: 'Primary technology area or research domain covered by the publication (e.g., FinFET, GAA, CFET, advanced packaging, materials research).']
  technology_node_focus varchar [note: 'Process node or technology generation that is the focus of the publication (e.g., 3nm, 2nm, sub-1nm).']
  title varchar [note: 'Full title of the technical publication, conference paper, journal article, or white paper.']
  url varchar [note: 'Web URL or hyperlink to the published article or conference proceedings.']
  venue varchar [note: 'Name of the conference, journal, symposium, or publication outlet (e.g., IEEE IEDM, VLSI Symposium, Nature Electronics, ECTC).']
  venue_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the publication venue category.']

  Note: 'Records of technical publications, conference papers, and journal articles authored by R&D staff. Captures publication ID, title, authors, publication venue (IEEE IEDM, VLSI Symposium, Nature Electronics, ECTC), publication type (conference paper, journal article, invited talk, white paper), submission date, acceptance date, publication date, associated research project, technology disclosure clearance status, export control review status (ITAR/EAR), and citation tracking. Supports IP strategy, talent branding, and regulatory disclosure management.'
}

Table research.budget_allocation {
  budget_allocation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for budget_allocation']
  primary_budget_principal_investigator_employee_id varchar [note: 'The employee identifier of the principal investigator responsible for the funded work.']
  research_program_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the R&D program receiving this budget allocation.']
  research_project_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific research project receiving this budget allocation, if applicable.']
  tertiary_budget_employee_id varchar [note: 'The user identifier of the person who last modified this budget allocation record.']
  allocation_code varchar [note: 'Business-readable unique code for the budget allocation, used for tracking and reporting purposes.']
  allocation_date date [note: 'The date on which the budget allocation was officially recorded and assigned.']
  allocation_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the budget allocation identifying the purpose or initiative being funded.']
  allocation_status varchar [note: 'The current lifecycle status of the budget allocation (e.g., draft, approved, active, on hold, completed, cancelled).']
  approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the budget allocation was approved by the approving authority.']
  approving_authority_name varchar [note: 'The name of the individual or committee that approved this budget allocation.']
  award_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total monetary amount awarded or allocated for this budget allocation.']
  award_date date [note: 'The date on which the funding award was officially granted or approved.']
  budget_category varchar [note: 'The primary budget category for this allocation (e.g., headcount, equipment, materials, external services, fab costs, IP licensing).']
  budget_for_program varchar [note: 'FK to research.program.program_id — Budget allocations fund R&D programs. Critical for financial tracking, CHIPS Act compliance reporting, and program cost management.']
  budget_funds_program varchar [note: 'FK to research.program.program_id — Budget allocations are assigned to R&D programs (and their constituent projects). This is essential for financial tracking and CHIPS Act compliance reporting.']
  budget_period_end_date date [note: 'The end date of the budget allocation period.']
  budget_period_start_date date [note: 'The start date of the budget allocation period.']
  chips_act_award_number varchar [note: 'The official CHIPS Act award number assigned by the granting agency, if applicable.']
  chips_act_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this budget allocation is subject to CHIPS Act compliance requirements.']
  collaboration_partner_name varchar [note: 'The name of external collaboration partners (universities, research institutions, consortia) involved in the funded work, if applicable.']
  compliance_obligations_description varchar [note: 'Description of compliance obligations associated with this funding, including CHIPS Act requirements, ITAR, EAR, and other regulatory constraints.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'The cost center code to which this budget allocation is assigned for financial tracking and reporting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this budget allocation record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'The three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the award amount (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY).']
  deliverables_description varchar [note: 'Description of the expected deliverables and milestones associated with this budget allocation.']
  export_control_classification varchar [note: 'The export control classification for the technology or research covered by this allocation (e.g., EAR99, ECCN, ITAR, NLR).']
  fiscal_year varchar [note: 'The fiscal year for which this budget allocation applies.']
  funding_source_type varchar [note: 'The type of funding source for this budget allocation.']
  grant_program_name varchar [note: 'The specific name of the grant program under which funding is provided (e.g., CHIPS for America R&D Program, DARPA ERI).']
  grant_type varchar [note: 'The type of government grant or funding mechanism (e.g., direct funding, tax credit, matching fund, equipment grant).']
  granting_agency_name varchar [note: 'The name of the government or external agency providing the grant funding, if applicable (e.g., DARPA, NSF, DOE, CHIPS Act office).']
  itar_controlled_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this budget allocation involves ITAR-controlled technology or data.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this budget allocation record was last modified.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or special instructions related to this budget allocation.']
  performance_period_end_date date [note: 'The end date of the performance period during which the funded work must be completed.']
  performance_period_start_date date [note: 'The start date of the performance period during which the funded work must be completed.']
  reporting_requirements_description varchar [note: 'Description of the reporting requirements and frequency mandated by the funding source or internal governance.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'The assessed risk level associated with this budget allocation and the funded work.']
  strategic_priority_level varchar [note: 'The strategic priority level assigned to this budget allocation by executive leadership.']
  technical_scope_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the technical scope and objectives covered by this budget allocation.']

  Note: 'R&D funding and budget allocation records tracking all approved funding assignments to R&D programs, projects, and collaborations — including government grants (CHIPS Act awards, DARPA contracts, NSF grants, DOE funding, international government R&D subsidies), internal R&D budgets, consortium contributions, and customer-funded NRE. Captures allocation ID, fiscal year, budget period, associated program or project, cost center, funding source and type, granting agency (for government funds), grant program name, grant type (direct funding, tax credit, matching fund, equipment grant), award amount, currency, award date, performance period, budget category (headcount, equipment, materials, external services, fab costs), technical scope, deliverables and reporting requirements, compliance obligations (CHIPS Act, ITAR, EAR), principal investigator, grant status, allocation date, and approving authority. SSOT for all R&D funding planning, tracking, government grant management, and compliance reporting.'
}

Table research.packaging_research {
  packaging_research_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the advanced packaging technology research record.']
  packaging_package_type_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to packaging.package_type. Business justification: R&D tracks development of specific package types; linking to master package_type enables BOM, cost, and compliance traceability.']
  primary_packaging_principal_investigator_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the principal investigator leading the packaging research.']
  research_program_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent R&D program under which this packaging research is conducted.']
  actual_completion_date date [note: 'Actual date when the packaging research project was completed or transitioned to production.']
  budget_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the NRE budget amounts.']
  chips_act_program_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this packaging research is funded or supported under the US CHIPS and Science Act program.']
  collaboration_partner_name varchar [note: 'Name of external collaboration partner (university, research institute, OSAT, foundry) involved in this packaging research.']
  collaboration_type varchar [note: 'Type of collaboration arrangement for the packaging research (internal, university partnership, OSAT joint development, foundry collaboration, industry consortium). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: Internal|University|Research Institute|OSAT|Foundry|Joint Development|Consortium — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this packaging research record was first created in the system.']
  development_maturity_stage varchar [note: 'Technology Readiness Level indicating the maturity stage of the packaging technology from basic research (TRL-1) to production-ready (TRL-9). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: TRL-1|TRL-2|TRL-3|TRL-4|TRL-5|TRL-6|TRL-7|TRL-8|TRL-9 — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  die_stack_count varchar [note: 'Number of die layers in the vertical stack for 3D packaging architectures.']
  experimental_lot_count varchar [note: 'Number of experimental wafer or packaging lots processed as part of this research program.']
  export_control_classification varchar [note: 'Export control classification number (ECCN) or designation under EAR or other export regulations.']
  integration_approach varchar [note: 'The integration architecture approach for the packaging technology (2.5D interposer, 3D stacking, fan-out, chiplet-based heterogeneous integration).']
  interconnect_density_target decimal(12,2) [note: 'Target interconnect density in connections per square millimeter for the packaging technology.']
  interconnect_pitch_um decimal(10,3) [note: 'Target or achieved interconnect pitch in micrometers for bump, pillar, or TSV connections.']
  ip_filing_count varchar [note: 'Number of patent applications or IP disclosures filed related to this packaging research.']
  itar_controlled_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this packaging research is subject to ITAR export control restrictions.']
  key_technical_challenges varchar [note: 'Description of the primary technical challenges and barriers being addressed in this packaging research (e.g., thermal management, warpage control, interconnect reliability, yield optimization).']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this packaging research record was last modified.']
  metal_layer_count varchar [note: 'Number of metal redistribution layers (RDL) in the packaging structure.']
  nre_budget_allocated decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total non-recurring engineering budget allocated for this packaging research project.']
  nre_budget_spent decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total non-recurring engineering budget spent to date on this packaging research project.']
  package_size_x_mm decimal(10,3) [note: 'Package dimension in the X-axis in millimeters.']
  package_size_y_mm decimal(10,3) [note: 'Package dimension in the Y-axis in millimeters.']
  package_thickness_mm decimal(10,3) [note: 'Total package thickness in millimeters including all die, substrate, and encapsulation layers.']
  packaging_technology_name varchar [note: 'Name of the advanced packaging technology under research (e.g., CoWoS-S, InFO-AiP, TSV-3D Stack).']
  packaging_technology_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the packaging technology platform being researched. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: CoWoS|InFO|TSV|WLCSP|Chiplet|Fan-Out|Fan-In|Flip-Chip — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  planned_completion_date date [note: 'Planned date for completion of the packaging research project.']
  reliability_qualification_status varchar [note: 'Status of reliability qualification testing (HTOL, HAST, TC, etc.) for the packaging technology.']
  research_record_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the packaging research record, used for external reference and tracking.']
  research_start_date date [note: 'Date when the packaging research project officially started.']
  research_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the packaging research project. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: Concept|Feasibility|Proof-of-Concept|Development|Validation|Pilot|Qualified|On-Hold|Cancelled — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  strategic_priority_level varchar [note: 'Strategic importance ranking of this packaging research to the organization\'s technology roadmap.']
  substrate_type varchar [note: 'Type of substrate material used in the packaging technology (e.g., organic, silicon interposer, glass, ceramic).']
  target_application varchar [note: 'Primary application domain targeted by this packaging technology (High-Performance Computing, AI accelerator, mobile, automotive, IoT, networking).']
  test_vehicle_design_count varchar [note: 'Number of test vehicle designs created and fabricated to validate the packaging technology.']
  thermal_performance_target_w_per_cm2 decimal(10,2) [note: 'Target thermal dissipation capability in watts per square centimeter for the packaging solution.']
  thermal_resistance_target_c_per_w decimal(10,4) [note: 'Target junction-to-ambient thermal resistance in degrees Celsius per watt.']
  warpage_target_um decimal(10,3) [note: 'Maximum allowable warpage in micrometers for the packaged assembly to ensure assembly yield and reliability.']
  yield_target_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target assembly and packaging yield percentage for production readiness.']

  Note: 'Advanced packaging technology research records covering development of next-generation packaging architectures including CoWoS (Chip on Wafer on Substrate), InFO (Integrated Fan-Out), TSV-based 3D-IC stacking, WLCSP, and heterogeneous integration platforms. Captures research record ID, packaging technology name, integration approach (2.5D, 3D, fan-out, chiplet), target application (HPC, AI accelerator, mobile, automotive), key technical challenges, interconnect density targets, thermal performance targets, associated experimental lots, and development maturity stage.'
}

Table research.yield_learning_record {
  yield_learning_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the yield learning record. Primary key for this entity.']
  experimental_lot_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the experimental wafer lot from which yield learning data was captured. Links to research fabrication lot tracking systems.']
  ic_catalog_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.ic_catalog. Business justification: YIELD ANALYSIS: Learning record captures yield data per product; supports continuous improvement and production planning.']
  packaging_package_type_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to packaging.package_type. Business justification: Yield learning analyses are performed per package type; linking enables targeted process improvement actions.']
  primary_yield_learning_engineer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the learning engineer responsible for this yield learning record.']
  research_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the research project under which this yield learning activity was conducted.']
  tapeout_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the research tapeout associated with this yield learning record. References the design submission event.']
  analysis_date date [note: 'Date on which the yield learning analysis was completed and findings were documented.']
  baseline_yield_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Yield percentage measured before corrective actions were implemented, used as the reference point for improvement calculations.']
  collaboration_partner_involved varchar [note: 'Name of external research institution, foundry, or equipment vendor involved in the yield learning activity, if applicable.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification level for this yield learning record based on sensitivity and intellectual property considerations.']
  corrective_action_proposed varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the corrective process actions or improvements proposed to address the identified yield detractors.']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the proposed corrective action in the implementation lifecycle. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: Proposed|Approved|In Progress|Implemented|Validated|Closed|Rejected — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this yield learning record was first created in the system.']
  critical_defect_count varchar [note: 'Number of defects classified as critical (yield-limiting) based on size, location, and impact on device functionality.']
  defect_density_per_cm2 decimal(10,4) [note: 'Average number of defects per square centimeter of wafer surface area, calculated from inspection data.']
  defect_type_primary varchar [note: 'Primary category of defect identified during yield analysis (e.g., particle contamination, pattern defect, electrical failure). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: Particle|Pattern|Electrical|Scratch|Contamination|Lithography|Etch|Deposition|CMP|Implant|Other — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  defect_type_secondary varchar [note: 'Secondary category of defect contributing to yield loss, if applicable. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: Particle|Pattern|Electrical|Scratch|Contamination|Lithography|Etch|Deposition|CMP|Implant|Other|None — 12 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  device_architecture_type varchar [note: 'Type of transistor or device architecture used in the experimental lot (e.g., FinFET, Gate-All-Around, Complementary FET). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FinFET|GAA|CFET|Planar|Nanowire|Nanosheet|FDSOI|Other — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  die_count_good varchar [note: 'Number of dies that passed yield testing and are classified as good.']
  die_count_total varchar [note: 'Total number of dies across all wafers included in this yield learning record.']
  die_yield_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of good dies per wafer measured during yield testing. Represents the ratio of functional dies to total dies on the wafer.']
  dominant_yield_detractor varchar [note: 'Primary mechanism or defect type identified as the leading cause of yield loss in this experimental lot or tapeout.']
  equipment_id_affected varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific fabrication equipment tool associated with the yield detractor, if applicable.']
  export_control_classification varchar [note: 'Export control classification for the yield learning data and associated technology (e.g., EAR99, ITAR, ECCN code).']
  functional_yield_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of dies that pass functional testing and meet all electrical specifications. Subset of die yield focusing on operational performance.']
  inspection_system_used varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the defect inspection and metrology system used to capture yield and defect data (e.g., KLA ICOS, optical inspection tool).']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this yield learning record was last updated or modified.']
  learning_cycle_phase varchar [note: 'Current phase of the yield learning cycle for this record (e.g., initial assessment, root cause analysis, corrective action, validation).']
  learning_engineer_name varchar [note: 'Name of the process integration or yield engineer responsible for conducting the yield learning analysis and documenting findings.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-text notes, observations, or context related to the yield learning analysis and findings.']
  pareto_analysis_performed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Pareto analysis was performed to prioritize yield detractors by impact.']
  process_step_affected varchar [note: 'Specific fabrication process step (e.g., lithography, etch, deposition, CMP) identified as the source of yield loss.']
  production_applicability_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the yield learning findings and corrective actions are applicable to production wafer lots and yield ramp planning.']
  production_integration_date date [note: 'Date on which the yield learning findings and corrective actions were integrated into production process flows.']
  root_cause_analysis_findings varchar [note: 'Detailed findings from root cause analysis identifying the underlying process, equipment, or material issues causing yield loss.']
  root_cause_category varchar [note: 'High-level category of the identified root cause (e.g., process variation, equipment malfunction, material defect, design issue). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: Process|Equipment|Material|Design|Handling|Environmental|Unknown — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  statistical_confidence_level varchar [note: 'Confidence level in the statistical validity of the yield learning findings based on sample size and data quality.']
  technology_node_nm varchar [note: 'Process technology node in nanometers at which the experimental lot or tapeout was fabricated (e.g., 7, 5, 3, 2).']
  wafer_count varchar [note: 'Number of wafers included in the yield learning analysis for this record.']
  yield_improvement_delta_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Measured improvement in yield percentage achieved after implementing corrective actions, compared to baseline yield.']

  Note: 'Yield learning records from experimental lots and research tapeouts capturing defect analysis, yield limiting mechanisms, and process improvement findings. Captures record ID, associated experimental lot or tapeout, technology node, yield measurement (die yield percentage, functional yield), dominant yield detractors, defect types identified (particle, pattern, electrical), root cause analysis findings, corrective process actions proposed, yield improvement delta achieved, and learning engineer. Feeds process integration improvement cycles and production yield ramp planning.'
}

Table research.competitive_benchmark {
  competitive_benchmark_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for competitive_benchmark']
  analyst_employee_id varchar [note: 'Employee identifier of the research analyst who conducted the benchmark analysis.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified this competitive benchmark record.']
  research_program_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the R&D program that commissioned or utilizes this competitive benchmark analysis.']
  technology_roadmap_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the technology roadmap that this competitive benchmark supports or informs.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the competitive benchmark analysis was formally approved for use in strategic planning and roadmap decisions.']
  approved_by_name varchar [note: 'Name of the authority who approved the competitive benchmark analysis for official use.']
  benchmark_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the competitive benchmark analysis, used for external reference and tracking.']
  benchmark_date date [note: 'Date when the competitive benchmark analysis was conducted or published.']
  benchmark_methodology varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the methodology used to conduct the competitive benchmark, including measurement techniques, test conditions, and analytical approaches.']
  benchmark_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the competitive benchmark analysis, typically including the technology node or device architecture being compared.']
  benchmark_source_reference varchar [note: 'Detailed citation or reference to the source document, publication, or analysis from which the benchmark data was derived.']
  benchmark_source_type varchar [note: 'The type of source from which the competitive benchmark data was obtained, such as public disclosure, teardown analysis, academic paper, or industry report.']
  benchmark_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the competitive benchmark record, indicating whether it is in draft, under review, approved for use, or archived.']
  competitive_gap_analysis varchar [note: 'Assessment of the performance gap between internal technology capabilities and competitor offerings, identifying areas of advantage or disadvantage.']
  competitor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the competitor company or foundry whose technology is being benchmarked against internal capabilities.']
  competitor_product_name varchar [note: 'Specific product, chip, or technology offering from the competitor that is the subject of this benchmark.']
  confidence_level varchar [note: 'Assessment of the confidence level in the benchmark data accuracy and reliability, based on source quality and verification methods.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification level indicating the sensitivity and access restrictions for this competitive benchmark record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this competitive benchmark record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_score varchar [note: 'Numerical score from 1 to 100 representing the overall quality and reliability of the benchmark data, based on source credibility and verification.']
  device_architecture_type varchar [note: 'Type of transistor or device architecture being benchmarked, such as FinFET (Fin Field-Effect Transistor), GAA (Gate All Around), CFET (Complementary FET), or other advanced structures. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: FinFET|GAA|CFET|Planar|Nanowire|Nanosheet|FDSOI|Other — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  drive_current_ua_per_um decimal(10,3) [note: 'On-state drive current of the competitor device normalized per unit width, measured in microamperes per micrometer, indicating performance capability.']
  export_control_classification varchar [note: 'Export control classification of the benchmark data under US Export Administration Regulations (EAR) or International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR).']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this competitive benchmark record was last updated or modified.']
  leakage_current_na_per_um decimal(10,3) [note: 'Off-state leakage current of the competitor device normalized per unit width, measured in nanoamperes per micrometer, indicating power efficiency.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, observations, or context regarding the competitive benchmark analysis that do not fit into structured fields.']
  operating_frequency_ghz decimal(8,3) [note: 'Maximum operating frequency of the competitor technology in gigahertz, a key performance metric.']
  power_consumption_mw decimal(10,3) [note: 'Measured or estimated power consumption of the competitor technology in milliwatts under specified operating conditions.']
  ppa_area_score decimal(8,3) [note: 'Area efficiency score for the competitor technology based on PPA analysis, normalized to a standard scale.']
  ppa_performance_score decimal(8,3) [note: 'Composite performance score for the competitor technology based on Power, Performance, and Area metrics, normalized to a standard scale.']
  ppa_power_score decimal(8,3) [note: 'Power efficiency score for the competitor technology based on PPA analysis, normalized to a standard scale.']
  strategic_implication_assessment varchar [note: 'Analysis of the strategic implications of the benchmark findings for internal technology roadmap decisions, competitive positioning, and investment priorities.']
  technology_node_nm varchar [note: 'The process technology node in nanometers being benchmarked (e.g., 5, 3, 2 for 5nm, 3nm, 2nm nodes).']
  technology_readiness_level varchar [note: 'Assessment of the maturity level of the competitor technology being benchmarked, using the standard TRL scale from basic research to production-ready. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: TRL 1|TRL 2|TRL 3|TRL 4|TRL 5|TRL 6|TRL 7|TRL 8|TRL 9 — promote to reference product]']
  transistor_density_mtransistors_per_mm2 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Measured or estimated transistor density of the competitor technology in millions of transistors per square millimeter, a key metric for area efficiency.']

  Note: 'Competitive technology benchmarking records tracking performance comparisons of internal technology nodes and device architectures against competitor and foundry offerings. Captures benchmark ID, benchmark date, technology node or device architecture being benchmarked, competitor or foundry reference, benchmark source (public disclosure, teardown analysis, published paper, industry report), PPA metrics compared (transistor density, drive current, leakage, frequency, power), benchmark methodology, confidence level, and strategic implication assessment. Supports technology roadmap decisions.'
}

  reporting_requirements varchar [note: 'Frequency and format of progress reports required by the agency.']
  tax_credit_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary value of any tax credit associated with the grant.']
  technical_scope varchar [note: 'Brief description of the technical objectives and research areas covered by the grant.']

  Note: 'Government research grant and funding program records including CHIPS Act awards, DARPA contracts, NSF grants, DOE funding, and international government R&D subsidies. Captures grant ID, granting agency, program name, grant type (direct funding, tax credit, matching fund, equipment grant), award amount, currency, award date, performance period, technical scope, deliverables and reporting requirements, compliance obligations, principal investigator, and grant status. Supports CHIPS Act compliance reporting and R&D capitalization tracking.'
}

Table research.process_flow_experiment {
  process_flow_experiment_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the experimental process flow record.']
  experimental_lot_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the experimental wafer lot associated with this flow.']
  primary_process_author_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who authored the flow.']
  research_program_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the research program under which this flow is executed.']
  research_project_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the research project that owns this flow.']
  actual_cycle_time_minutes decimal(6,2) [note: 'Measured total processing time after execution.']
  actual_yield_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Measured die yield percentage after execution.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current approval state of the flow.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the flow was approved.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance status of the flow with industry standards.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification for the flow record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the flow record was created.']
  doe_split_details varchar [note: 'Details of the DOE split (e.g., factor levels, randomization).']
  doe_split_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the flow includes a DOE split.']
  equipment_type varchar [note: 'Category of equipment used (e.g., CVD, PVD, ALD, EUV, DUV, CMP, Lithography, Etch, Implant). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: CVD|PVD|ALD|EUV|DUV|CMP|Lithography|Etch|Implant — promote to reference product]']
  expected_yield_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target die yield percentage anticipated for the flow.']
  export_control_classification varchar [note: 'Export control regime applicable to the flow.']
  flow_code varchar [note: 'Human‑readable unique code for the experiment (e.g., PFX‑2023‑001).']
  flow_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the experimental process flow.']
  flow_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the flow purpose (research, pilot, etc.).']
  flow_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the flow (e.g., v1, v2).']
  itar_controlled_flag boolean [note: 'True if the flow is subject to ITAR restrictions.']
  key_process_parameters varchar [note: 'Critical parameters (temperature, pressure, time) for each step, stored as JSON or delimited text.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the flow record.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the experimental flow.']
  process_flow_complexity_score varchar [note: 'Numeric score representing the overall complexity of the flow (higher = more complex).']
  process_flow_experiment_description varchar [note: 'Detailed free‑text description of the experimental flow.']
  process_flow_experiment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the experimental flow.']
  process_pressure_pa decimal(10,2) [note: 'Operating pressure for the process step(s).']
  process_step_sequence varchar [note: 'Ordered list of process steps (e.g., FEOL→MOL→BEOL) encoded as a delimited string.']
  process_temperature_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Operating temperature for the process step(s).']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk assessment rating for the experimental flow.']
  split_conditions varchar [note: 'Design‑of‑Experiments split criteria for the flow, stored as JSON or delimited text.']
  target_cycle_time_minutes decimal(6,2) [note: 'Planned total processing time for the flow.']
  target_device_structure varchar [note: 'Intended device architecture (e.g., FinFET, GAA) for the flow.']
  technology_node varchar [note: 'Target technology node for the experimental flow.']
  tool_identifier varchar [note: 'Unique identifier or serial number of the equipment tool used.']
  total_steps varchar [note: 'Count of distinct steps in the experimental flow.']

  Note: 'Experimental process flow records defining the sequence of process steps for a research wafer lot or process integration experiment. Captures flow ID, associated technology node, flow version, process step sequence (FEOL, MOL, BEOL), each step name and tool type, key process parameters per step, split conditions for DOE (Design of Experiments) splits, target device structures, flow author, and flow approval status. Distinct from production process flows managed in the process domain — these are research-grade exploratory flows.'
}

Table research.program_partner_collaboration {
  program_partner_collaboration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the ProgramPartnerCollaboration association']
  channel_partner_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the channel partner']
  collaboration_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the collaboration agreement between the partner and the program']
  research_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the R&D program']
  partner_role varchar [note: 'Role of the channel partner within the program (e.g., co‑developer, co‑seller)']

  Note: 'Represents the operational agreement between a sales channel partner and an R&D program. Each record links one channel_partner to one rd_program and stores attributes that belong exclusively to the partnership.. Existence Justification: Channel partners (distributors, VARs, system integrators) actively collaborate with multiple R&D programs, and each R&D program can involve multiple channel partners. The business records a collaboration agreement per partner‑program pair, capturing the partner\'s role and a unique agreement identifier, which is managed and updated by stakeholders.'
}

Table research.compliance_assessment {
  compliance_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the compliance_assessment association']
  obligation_register_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the compliance obligation']
  research_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the research project']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date the compliance assessment was performed for the project‑obligation pair']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Result of the assessment (e.g., compliant, partially compliant, non‑compliant)']
  remediation_plan varchar [note: 'Planned actions to address any identified compliance gaps']

  Note: 'Represents the assessment of a specific regulatory or standards obligation for a given research project. Each record links one project to one obligation and stores data that belongs to the assessment itself.. Existence Justification: Each research project must satisfy multiple regulatory obligations, and each obligation can apply to many projects across the organization. The compliance team records an assessment for every project‑obligation pair, capturing the assessment date, status, and remediation plan. This relationship is actively managed and updated as projects progress and obligations evolve.'
}

Table research.test_structure {
  test_structure_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for test_structure']
  fab_tool_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the test equipment used for this structure.']
  parent_test_structure_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on test_structure (parent_test_structure_id)']

  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the test structure record was created.']
  current_limit_ma decimal(10,2) [note: 'Maximum current allowed during the test in milliamps.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the test structure purpose and configuration.']
  documentation_url varchar [note: 'Link to detailed documentation or specification for the test structure.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the test structure becomes effective for use.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the test structure is retired or no longer valid (null if indefinite).']
  feature_size_nm decimal(10,2) [note: 'Nominal feature size of the structure in nanometers.']
  frequency_mhz decimal(10,2) [note: 'Test signal frequency in megahertz.']
  is_standard boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the structure is part of the standard test library.']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measurement used for primary quantitative attributes (e.g., nm, mV).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the test structure.']
  owner_department varchar [note: 'Organizational department responsible for the test structure.']
  related_process_node varchar [note: 'Process node (e.g., 7nm, 5nm) associated with the test structure.']
  revision_number varchar [note: 'Revision number of the test structure definition.']
  safety_classification varchar [note: 'Safety classification of the test structure per internal safety standards.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the test structure.']
  structure_code varchar [note: 'External code used to reference the test structure in documentation and tooling.']
  structure_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the test structure.']
  temperature_c decimal(10,2) [note: 'Temperature at which the test is performed, in degrees Celsius.']
  test_category varchar [note: 'Higher‑level grouping of the test structure.']
  test_duration_ms varchar [note: 'Typical duration of the test execution in milliseconds.']
  test_environment varchar [note: 'Physical or simulated environment conditions for the test (e.g., cleanroom, probe station).']
  test_methodology varchar [note: 'Method or standard followed when executing the test.']
  test_purpose varchar [note: 'Business or engineering purpose of the test structure.']
  test_type varchar [note: 'Category of test performed by the structure.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the test structure record.']
  voltage_level_mv decimal(10,2) [note: 'Operating voltage level for the test in millivolts.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for test_structure. Referenced by test_structure_id.'
}

Table research.process_split {
  process_split_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for process_split']
  associated_ip_ip_core_development_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the IP core linked to this process split.']
  fab_tool_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the primary equipment used for this split.']
  parent_process_split_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on process_split (parent_process_split_id)']
  project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the R&D project that owns this split.']
  related_process_process_flow_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent manufacturing process to which this split belongs.']
  wafer_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the wafer involved in the split.']
  average_yield_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Average production yield achieved for this split, expressed as a percentage.']
  change_control_number varchar [note: 'Change control identifier for tracking modifications to the split.']
  code varchar [note: 'External code used to reference the process split across systems.']
  compliance_regulation varchar [note: 'Regulatory or industry standard code applicable to the split.']
  cost_currency varchar [note: 'Currency code for the cost estimate.']
  cost_estimate_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Estimated cost to implement the split, expressed in US dollars.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the process split record was first created.']
  data_classification varchar [note: 'Classification level indicating data sensitivity.']
  deprecation_date date [note: 'Date on which the split was officially deprecated.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed free‑text description of the process split.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the process split ceases to be effective (null if open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the process split becomes effective for production.']
  equipment_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the equipment used.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the split is critical for downstream product performance.']
  is_deprecated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the split has been deprecated.']
  last_modified_by_user varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified the record.']
  last_validation_date date [note: 'Date when the split was last validated against specifications.']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the split ratio (e.g., percent or ratio).']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the process split.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the process split.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Priority assigned to the split for scheduling and resource allocation.']
  process_step_count varchar [note: 'Number of individual steps defined within this split.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Risk classification associated with the split.']
  split_method varchar [note: 'Primary manufacturing method used to achieve the split.']
  split_ratio decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric ratio representing the proportion of wafers or dies allocated to this split.']
  split_reason varchar [note: 'Business or technical rationale for creating this process split.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the process split.']
  total_cycle_time_minutes decimal(8,2) [note: 'Aggregate cycle time for the split expressed in minutes.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category of the process split based on technology node or architecture.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the process split record.']
  validation_status varchar [note: 'Result of the most recent validation activity.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the process split definition.']
  wafer_lot_number varchar [note: 'Lot number of the wafer batch associated with this split.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for process_split. Referenced by process_split_id.'
}

Table research.test_plan {

  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who last modified the test plan.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the test plan record.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version label of the test plan (e.g., v1.0, v2.1).']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who initially created the test plan.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for test_plan. Referenced by test_plan_id.'
}

Table invoice.ar_invoice {
  ar_invoice_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the invoice record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer billed on the invoice.']
  approver_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Invoice approval workflow requires an accounting employee to approve; each invoice has one approver, many invoices per employee.']
  ar_payment_term_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to invoice.payment_term. Business justification: Invoices reference a payment‑term master; adding payment_term_id FK normalizes payment terms and removes the redundant free‑text payment_terms column.']
  ar_pricing_agreement_id varchar [note: 'FK to invoice.pricing_agreement.pricing_agreement_id — Invoices generated under negotiated pricing must reference the governing pricing agreement for price validation and audit.']
  billing_address_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.address. Business justification: Links invoice to a normalized address record for tax jurisdiction and export‑control validation; required by regulatory reporting.']
  billing_contact_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.contact. Business justification: Required for Accounts Receivable to send invoice notices to the designated billing contact; standard practice in semiconductor B2B invoicing.']
  customer_contract_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the underlying contract or agreement (e.g., NRE milestone, royalty agreement).']
  export_license_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.export_license. Business justification: Export compliance requires each invoice to reference the export license authorizing the shipment for customs reporting.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Required for General Ledger posting of each invoice to the appropriate GL account for revenue and receivables reporting.']
  ic_catalog_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.ic_catalog. Business justification: EXPORT COMPLIANCE: Invoices must be validated against the product\'s ITAR/EAR classification (ic_catalog.it ar_controlled, ear_eccn_code). Linking ar_invoice to ic_catalog enables automated export‑cont']
  ic_design_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to design.ic_design_project. Business justification: Final invoices for a design project must be associated with that project for accounting, revenue recognition, and project performance reporting.']
  opportunity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.opportunity. Business justification: REQUIRED: Opportunity‑to‑revenue attribution; enables pipeline performance reporting that ties closed opportunities to actual invoiced revenue.']
  payment_term_id varchar [note: 'FK to invoice.payment_term.payment_term_id — Every invoice must reference its applicable payment terms to calculate due dates, discount windows, and penalty triggers.']
  pkg_assembly_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to packaging.assembly_order. Business justification: Required for the Packaging Service Billing Report, which matches each invoice to the underlying assembly order that generated the packaged product.']
  purchase_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.purchase_order. Business justification: Three-way match process requires linking each customer invoice to the originating purchase order for audit, payment, and compliance.']
  quote_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.quote. Business justification: REQUIRED: Quote‑to‑cash audit; linking the original sales quote to the resulting invoice supports commission calculations and compliance reporting.']
  sales_order_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the sales order that generated the invoice.']
  test_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to test.test_program. Business justification: Test Program Service Invoice – invoices for test‑program services need to identify the associated test_program for cost allocation and compliance reporting.']
  to_payment_term_id varchar [note: 'FK to invoice.payment_term.payment_term_id — Every invoice must reference its applicable payment terms to calculate due date and discount eligibility. Required for AR aging and cash forecasting.']
  to_pricing_agreement_id varchar [note: 'FK to invoice.pricing_agreement.pricing_agreement_id — Invoices generated under negotiated pricing or rebate agreements must reference the governing agreement for price validation and rebate accrual.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice was approved for posting.']
  ar_invoice_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the invoice.']
  auditor_notes varchar [note: 'Comments added by internal auditors during review.']
  cancelled_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice was cancelled, if applicable.']
  collection_status varchar [note: 'Current state of the collections process for the invoice.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO code of the currency used for the invoice.']
  customer_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the invoicing customer.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total discount applied to the invoice (e.g., early‑payment or volume discount).']
  document_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the invoice (commercial sale, pro‑forma for customs, or inter‑company transfer).']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which payment is expected according to payment terms.']
  early_payment_discount decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage discount offered for early settlement, if applicable.']
  ecn_classification varchar [note: 'Classification used for export control compliance.']
  export_control_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the invoice is subject to export control regulations.']
  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount before taxes, discounts, and adjustments.']
  hs_code varchar [note: 'Customs classification code for the shipped product.']
  incoterms varchar [note: 'International commercial terms defining delivery responsibilities.']
  invoice_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was generated and sent to the customer.']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the invoice by the billing system.']
  is_credit_memo boolean [note: 'True if the document is a credit memo rather than a standard invoice.']
  is_proforma boolean [note: 'True if the document is a pro‑forma invoice used for customs or advance payment.']
  late_fee_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Penalty amount applied when payment is received after the due date.']
  line_item_count varchar [note: 'Number of line items included on the invoice.']
  net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount payable after taxes and discounts.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Means by which the customer intends to settle the invoice.']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of payment collection for the invoice.']
  posted_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice was posted to the general ledger.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was posted to the general ledger.']
  remarks varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes entered by billing staff.']
  shipping_address varchar [note: 'Delivery location for the goods or services covered by the invoice.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total tax calculated for the invoice.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Code that determines tax rate and calculation rules for the invoice.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the invoice record.']

  Note: 'Authoritative accounts receivable invoice record for all customer billing transactions in the semiconductor business. Captures the full invoice lifecycle from draft through posted, sent, disputed, and paid states. Covers commercial product shipment invoices, NRE milestone billing, IP royalty invoices, service invoices, and pro-forma documents for customs/LC/advance payment purposes. Includes document_type classification (commercial, proforma, intercompany) with proforma-specific attributes for HS/HTS codes, ECCN classification, incoterms, and export control documentation. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA SD and FI modules. SSOT for all customer-facing billing documents.'
}

Table invoice.invoice_line {
  invoice_line_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each invoice line item.']
  assembly_lot_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to packaging.assembly_lot. Business justification: Supports lot‑based invoicing; each line item must reference the specific assembly lot shipped, enabling the Lot Shipment Billing report.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Enables line‑level cost allocation to a cost center, essential for internal cost tracking and profitability analysis.']
  customer_contract_id varchar [note: 'Reference to a contract (e.g., NRE or royalty agreement) governing this line.']
  defect_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to quality.defect_record. Business justification: Defect Charge‑Back Reconciliation links each invoice line to the Defect Record that caused a customer charge‑back or credit.']
  design_ip_core_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the IP core associated with a royalty line.']
  eccn_classification_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.eccn_classification. Business justification: Customs filing mandates linking each line item to its ECCN classification record for export‑control documentation.']
  fab_tool_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to equipment.fab_tool. Business justification: Customer billing per tool usage is recorded on invoice lines; linking to fab_tool provides detailed cost allocation and OEE reporting.']
  fabrication_wafer_lot_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to fabrication.fabrication_wafer_lot. Business justification: Needed for the Invoice Line Item for Wafer Lot process, linking each line to the specific wafer lot for traceability and warranty claims.']
  final_test_run_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to test.final_test_run. Business justification: Final Test Run Billing Reconciliation – each invoice line for test services must reference the specific final_test_run to match revenue with test yield and satisfy audit requirements.']
  goods_receipt_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.goods_receipt. Business justification: Invoice verification against goods receipt ensures received quantity matches billed amount, required for compliance and financial reconciliation.']
  inspection_lot_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_lot. Business justification: Inspection Result Posting requires each invoice line to reference the Inspection Lot that validated the wafer lot before billing.']
  mpw_shuttle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to design.mpw_shuttle. Business justification: MPW shuttle services are billed as line items; the FK provides traceability of shuttle usage and cost allocation.']
  order_line_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.order_line. Business justification: Invoice lines are generated from order lines; linking enables traceability for revenue recognition, audit, and dispute resolution.']
  packaging_package_type_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to packaging.package_type. Business justification: Ensures invoice line package type references the master package_type table for compliance and cost reporting, replacing the free-text packaging_type field.']
  po_line_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.po_line. Business justification: Three-way match ties each invoice line to its specific purchase order line to validate quantities, pricing, and delivery dates.']
  primary_ar_invoice_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent invoice to which this line belongs.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Supports profit‑center attribution per invoice line, required for segment profitability reporting.']
  reach_svhc_declaration_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.reach_svhc_declaration. Business justification: REACH/SVHC regulations require associating each sold SKU with its declaration for hazardous substance reporting.']
  sales_rep_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Sales order lines are assigned to a sales representative employee for commission tracking and performance reporting.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the product or service billed on this line.']
  to_ar_invoice_id varchar [note: 'FK to invoice.ar_invoice.ar_invoice_id — Fundamental header-to-line relationship. Every invoice line must reference its parent invoice. Without this FK, the domain cannot function — you cannot construct an invoice document.']
  yield_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to quality.yield_record. Business justification: Yield‑Based Billing Report requires each invoice line to reference the Yield Record that determines the price adjustment for that wafer lot.']
  billing_period_end date [note: 'End date of the billing period covered by this line.']
  billing_period_start date [note: 'Start date of the billing period covered by this line.']
  charge_type varchar [note: 'Category of the charge (e.g., product sale, service, NRE milestone, royalty, wafer lot, packaging).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the line record was first created.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the amounts.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Monetary discount applied to this line.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the line becomes effective for accounting purposes.']
  external_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier from an external system (e.g., ERP or billing platform) for traceability.']
  gl_account_code varchar [note: 'Financial GL account to which this line is posted.']
  gross_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Total amount before discounts and taxes (quantity × unit_price).']
  is_discount_applied boolean [note: 'True if a discount was applied to this line.']
  is_tax_exempt boolean [note: 'Indicates whether tax is exempt for this line.']
  line_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the billed item or service.']
  line_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the line item.']
  net_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Final amount after discounts and taxes.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form comments or internal notes for the line.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Standard payment terms applied to this line.']
  product_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the product or service.']
  product_sku varchar [note: 'Manufacturer-assigned SKU for the billed product.']
  project_code varchar [note: 'Internal project or NRE code associated with the line.']
  quantity decimal(18,4) [note: 'Number of units billed on this line.']
  revenue_recognition_category varchar [note: 'Accounting treatment for revenue timing.']
  royalty_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage rate applied for royalty‑based charges.']
  sales_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the sale was made.']
  sales_region varchar [note: 'Geographic sales region associated with the line.']
  sequence varchar [note: 'Sequential order of the line within the invoice.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Tax calculated for this line based on tax_code.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the tax jurisdiction and rate applied.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Measurement unit for the quantity (e.g., pieces, sets, kilograms).']
  unit_price decimal(18,4) [note: 'Price per unit before discounts and taxes.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the line record.']

  Note: 'Individual line items on a customer invoice, each representing a distinct billable element such as a specific IC product SKU shipment, an NRE milestone charge, an IP royalty fee, a wafer lot charge, or a packaging service fee. Captures quantity, unit price, extended amount, tax code, revenue recognition category, and product/service reference. Supports multi-line invoices with mixed billing types.'
}

Table invoice.nre_billing_milestone {
  nre_billing_milestone_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each NRE billing milestone record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer being billed.']
