  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the skill definition was last reviewed for relevance.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the skill (e.g., "Lithography Process Engineer").']
  proficiency_level varchar [note: 'Numeric representation of the skill proficiency (e.g., 1‑5).']
  proficiency_scale varchar [note: 'Scale used for the proficiency_level value.']
  skill_domain varchar [note: 'Business domain or functional area where the skill is applied.']
  skill_family varchar [note: 'Higher‑level grouping of related skills (e.g., "Process Engineering").']
  skill_group varchar [note: 'Sub‑group within a family for more granular classification.']
  skill_type varchar [note: 'Category that describes the nature of the skill.']
  skill_version varchar [note: 'Version string for the skill definition to support change management.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the skill.']
  status_reason varchar [note: 'Free‑text explanation for the current status (e.g., "Retired due to technology shift").']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the skill record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for skill. Referenced by skill_id.'
}

Table workforce.job {
  job_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for job']
  location_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary fab or office location where the job is based.']
  parent_job_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on job (parent_job_id)']
  reports_to_job_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the supervisory job to which this role reports.']
  compensation_band varchar [note: 'Broad compensation range grouping used for budgeting and equity analysis.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the job record was first created in the system.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the job is retired or no longer available for staffing (nullable).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the job becomes active and eligible for staffing.']
  employment_type varchar [note: 'Contractual relationship of the employee to the company.']
  hourly_rate decimal(10,2) [note: 'Base hourly compensation for hourly‑paid positions.']
  internal_job_code varchar [note: 'Legacy identifier used by internal HR systems for cross‑system reconciliation.']
  is_manager boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the job includes managerial responsibilities.']
  job_benefits varchar [note: 'Standard benefits package associated with the position (e.g., health, retirement).']
  job_category varchar [note: 'Category that classifies the job by function such as Operator, Engineer, Manager.']
  job_code varchar [note: 'Unique alphanumeric code used to reference the job across systems.']
  job_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the purpose, scope, and key duties of the job.']
  job_family varchar [note: 'High‑level grouping of jobs that share similar skill sets or functional area (e.g., Manufacturing, Design, Test).']
  job_level varchar [note: 'Organizational level indicating seniority or responsibility (e.g., L1, L2, Senior).']
  job_opening_number varchar [note: 'Link to the specific opening request that created this job definition.']
  job_requirements varchar [note: 'Essential qualifications, experience, and education needed for the role.']
  job_responsibilities varchar [note: 'Detailed list of primary duties and accountabilities for the position.']
  job_summary varchar [note: 'Brief overview of the role used in job postings and internal catalogs.']
  job_title varchar [note: 'Official title of the position as displayed to employees and candidates.']
  job_type varchar [note: 'Broad type of work performed, used for reporting and workforce planning.']
  overtime_eligible boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the position is eligible for overtime compensation.']
  remote_allowed boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if the job can be performed remotely, fully or partially.']
  required_certifications varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of mandatory certifications or clearances for the job.']
  salary_grade varchar [note: 'Internal salary band identifier used for compensation planning.']
  shift_hours varchar [note: 'Standard number of work hours scheduled per week for the shift.']
  shift_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the work shift pattern for the role.']
  skill_set varchar [note: 'Key technical and soft skills required to perform the job successfully.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the job position.']
  travel_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Estimated proportion of time spent traveling for the role.']
  travel_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the role requires travel away from the primary location.']
  union_member boolean [note: 'Flag showing if the employee in this role is covered by a labor union.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the job record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for job. Referenced by internal_job_id.'
}

Table workforce.shift_pattern {
  shift_pattern_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for shift_pattern']
  rotated_from_shift_pattern_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on shift_pattern (rotated_from_shift_pattern_id)']
  break_duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Total allotted break time within the shift, expressed in minutes.']
  code varchar [note: 'Short alphanumeric code used to reference the shift pattern in scheduling systems.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the shift pattern record was first created in the system.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed free‑text description of the shift pattern, including any special rules.']
  duration_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total length of the shift in hours, including paid time.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date on which the shift pattern becomes valid for scheduling.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date after which the shift pattern is no longer valid (null if open‑ended).']
  end_time varchar [note: 'Clock‑time when the shift ends (HH:MM, 24‑hour format).']
  is_default boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this pattern is the default for new workforce assignments.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the shift pattern (e.g., "Day Shift", "Night Shift").']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form notes or comments about the shift pattern.']
  start_time varchar [note: 'Clock‑time when the shift begins (HH:MM, 24‑hour format).']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the shift pattern.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category of the shift pattern indicating its scheduling model.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the shift pattern record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for shift_pattern. Referenced by shift_pattern_id.'
}

Table workforce.training_course {
  training_course_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for training_course']
  prerequisite_training_course_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on training_course (prerequisite_training_course_id)']
  certification_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether successful completion awards a certification.']
  cost_amount decimal(10,2) [note: 'Monetary cost charged to the employee or department for the course.']
  course_code varchar [note: 'External catalog code used to reference the course in HR and LMS systems.']
  course_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the training course.']
  course_type varchar [note: 'Category of the course indicating its primary focus area.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the course record was first created in the system.']
  credit_units decimal(4,2) [note: 'Number of credit units awarded upon successful completion.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the cost amount.']
  delivery_method varchar [note: 'Mode in which the course is delivered to participants.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed textual description of the course content and objectives.']
  duration_hours decimal(5,2) [note: 'Total instructional time of the course expressed in hours.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date after which the course is no longer offered (nullable for open‑ended).']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the course becomes available for enrollment.']
  instructor_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary instructor or facilitator.']
  language varchar [note: 'Primary language in which the course material is delivered.']
  level varchar [note: 'Complexity level of the course content.']
  prerequisite_courses varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of course_codes that must be completed before enrolling.']
  skill_tags varchar [note: 'Semicolon‑separated skill identifiers associated with the course (e.g., lithography, python).']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the course.']
  target_audience varchar [note: 'Intended employee groups or roles for the course (e.g., fab operators, engineers).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification to the course record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for training_course. Referenced by course_id.'
}

Table shared.site {
  site_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for site']
  parent_site_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on site (parent_site_id)']
  site_location_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to shared.location. Business justification: Site belongs to a geographic location; adding site_location_id creates a child→parent FK and eliminates potential duplicate address data.']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the site’s street address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the site’s street address (optional).']
  capacity_per_day varchar [note: 'Maximum number of units the site can produce per day.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the site is located.']
  closing_date date [note: 'Date the site ceased operations, if applicable.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current regulatory compliance state of the site.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the site resides.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the site record was first created in the data lake.']
  data_center_flag boolean [note: 'True if the site hosts data‑center facilities.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the site’s purpose or characteristics.']
  environmental_certification varchar [note: 'Environmental sustainability certification held by the site.']
  last_maintenance_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent scheduled maintenance.']
  latitude double [note: 'Geographic latitude of the site in decimal degrees.']
  longitude double [note: 'Geographic longitude of the site in decimal degrees.']
  manager_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the site manager.']
  manager_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the person responsible for site operations.']
  manager_phone varchar [note: 'Contact phone number of the site manager.']
  number_of_employees varchar [note: 'Total number of staff assigned to the site.']
  opening_date date [note: 'Date the site began operations.']
  operational_since timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp when the site became operational.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the site address.']
  power_capacity_kw varchar [note: 'Maximum electrical power capacity of the site in kilowatts.']
  primary_contact_phone varchar [note: 'General contact phone number for the site.']
  region varchar [note: 'Broad geographic region grouping for the site.']
  security_classification varchar [note: 'Data security level assigned to the site.']
  site_code varchar [note: 'External code used to reference the site in enterprise systems.']
  site_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the site.']
  site_owner varchar [note: 'Organizational unit that owns the site.']
  site_type varchar [note: 'Category describing the primary function of the site.']
  square_footage varchar [note: 'Total usable floor area of the site in square feet.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province of the site location.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the site.']
  timezone varchar [note: 'IANA time‑zone identifier for the site (e.g., America/Los_Angeles).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the site record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for site. Referenced by site_id.'
}

Table shared.location {
  location_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for location']
  parent_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent location in a hierarchical geography (e.g., campus > building).']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address of the location.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address information (suite, building, etc.).']
  capacity_per_day decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum number of units the facility can produce per day.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the location is situated.']
  closing_date date [note: 'Date the location ceased operations (null if still active).']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Financial cost‑center identifier linked to the location.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the location resides.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the location record was first created in the data lake.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description providing additional context about the location.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for the location.']
  latitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic latitude in decimal degrees.']
  location_code varchar [note: 'External business code used to reference the location in contracts, shipping documents and ERP systems.']
  longitude decimal(9,6) [note: 'Geographic longitude in decimal degrees.']
  manager_name varchar [note: 'Name of the person responsible for day‑to‑day operations.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the facility, plant, warehouse or office.']
  number_of_employees varchar [note: 'Number of staff assigned to the location.']
  opening_date date [note: 'Date the location became operational.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for the location.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code for the location\'s mailing address.']
  region varchar [note: 'Broad geographic region (e.g., EMEA, APAC, AMER) for reporting aggregation.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the upstream operational system that supplied the record.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Native identifier of the location in the source system.']
  square_footage decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total usable floor area of the location in square feet.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'State or province abbreviation for the location.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the location.']
  timezone varchar [note: 'IANA time‑zone identifier for the location (e.g., America/Los_Angeles).']
  type varchar [note: 'Category of the location indicating its primary function within the semiconductor business.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the location record.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Public website URL for the location, if applicable.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for location. Referenced by location_id.'
}

Table shared.fab {
  fab_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for fab']
  fab_location_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to shared.location. Business justification: Fab is situated at a location; adding fab_location_id creates a child→parent FK and allows removal of address fields now stored in location.']
  annual_power_mwh decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total electricity consumption per year in megawatt‑hours.']
  annual_water_m3 decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total water usage per year in cubic meters.']
  audit_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Score from the latest audit (0‑100).']
  capacity_units_per_month varchar [note: 'Maximum number of wafers or units the fab can produce per month.']
  carbon_footprint_tons decimal(10,2) [note: 'Estimated CO₂ emissions per year in metric tons.']
  cleanroom_count varchar [note: 'Count of ISO‑class cleanroom spaces within the fab.']
  code varchar [note: 'External code used to reference the fab in enterprise systems.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the fab record was first created in the data lake.']
  emergency_contact_number varchar [note: 'Phone number for emergency response at the fab.']
  environmental_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current status of environmental regulatory compliance.']
  is_critical_facility boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the fab is designated as a critical manufacturing site.']
  last_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent internal or external audit.']
  maintenance_window_end_time timestamp [note: 'Scheduled end time for regular maintenance window.']
  maintenance_window_start_time timestamp [note: 'Scheduled start time for regular maintenance window.']
  manager_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the fab manager.']
  manager_name varchar [note: 'Name of the person responsible for overall fab management.']
  manager_phone varchar [note: 'Contact phone number for the fab manager.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the fab.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information about the fab.']
  number_of_equipment_units varchar [note: 'Total number of major manufacturing equipment units.']
  operating_shift_count varchar [note: 'Number of production shifts run per day.']
  owner_company varchar [note: 'Legal entity that owns the fab.']
  primary_product_family varchar [note: 'Main product family manufactured at the fab.']
  safety_certification varchar [note: 'Safety management certification held by the fab.']
  security_clearance_level varchar [note: 'Security classification required for personnel accessing the fab.']
  shutdown_date date [note: 'Date when the fab ceased operations (null if still active).']
  start_date date [note: 'Date when the fab began operations.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the fab.']
  technology_node_nm varchar [note: 'Process technology node supported (e.g., 7nm, 14nm).']
  total_area_sqft decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total built‑up area of the fab in square feet.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category of manufacturing performed at the fab.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the fab record.']
  waste_disposal_method varchar [note: 'Primary method for handling manufacturing waste.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for fab. Referenced by fab_id.'
}

Ref: workforce.safety_event.fab_site_id > fabrication.fab_site.fab_site_id
Ref: workforce.safety_event.shift_schedule_id > workforce.shift_schedule.shift_schedule_id
Ref: workforce.compensation_plan.superseded_compensation_plan_id > workforce.compensation_plan.compensation_plan_id
Ref: workforce.skill.employee_id > workforce.employee.employee_id
Ref: workforce.skill.parent_skill_id > workforce.skill.skill_id
Ref: workforce.job.location_id > shared.location.location_id
Ref: workforce.job.parent_job_id > workforce.job.job_id
Ref: workforce.job.reports_to_job_id > workforce.job.job_id
Ref: workforce.shift_pattern.rotated_from_shift_pattern_id > workforce.shift_pattern.shift_pattern_id
Ref: workforce.training_course.prerequisite_training_course_id > workforce.training_course.training_course_id
Ref: shared.site.parent_site_id > shared.site.site_id
Ref: shared.site.site_location_id > shared.location.location_id
Ref: shared.location.parent_location_id > shared.location.location_id
Ref: shared.fab.fab_id > equipment.fab.fab_id
Ref: shared.fab.fab_location_id > shared.location.location_id
